positionList.title: Founder, National Organizer
positionList.description: Leader and executive of national organization with chapters across all regions of the United States. Developed and drove political campaign design, strategy & implementation. Oversight of national recruitment, engagement and leadership development.

positionList.title: Workforce Strategy
positionList.description:
SEIU 1199NW represents more than 26,000 nurses and healthcare workers across Washington State united for quality patient care and good careers in the healthcare facilities and agencies. A union is an independent organization created by employees to advocate for their common interests. SEIU is the largest, most united union of healthcare workers in the nation. This union includes doctors, registered nurses, licensed practical nurses, pharmacists, technicians, professionals, therapists, mental health workers, certified nursing aides, housekeeping and dietary staff, and other healthcare workers.

Directed all facets of remote project execution during my service, I led the 600 person, multi facility work site to found their first union resulting in improved wages, benefits and voice. Adept at  designing communication plans to capture hearts and minds and build meaningful workforce movements for social progress, advanced at assessing nuanced cultural, human, sociological signals I was principal in breaking ground, building relationships with individuals and groups who were de-certifying their union or had negative associations with unions with powerful pro-union results.

• Project design and execution
• Messaging, communications design
• Opposing party informal negotiations
• Track, evaluate and deliver metrics
• Power mapping
• Systems thinking
• Collaborative campaign design
• Advanced capacity to build trust during cold entry
• Ability to drive towards goal, deliver results against overwhelming odds
• Solutions and connections for lead negotiators and attorneys

positionList.title: Advisory Board Member
positionList.description: Find Ventures envisions a world where all entrepreneurs have a shot at solving our greatest challenges and those who seek resources can find them confidently. Through early-stage funding, we’re seeding a generation of founders and innovation for all.

positionList.title: Co-Founder, Chief Business Development Officer
positionList.description:
Included is the leading Agentic AI platform for instant HR data insights & decision making. Just ask "Hey Included, can I see my favorite HR metrics in real time & by forecast?" Included provides instant answers, and proactively delivers insights on your most pressing issues. 

Included eliminates months of time spent on HR data knitting, cleaning, analysis and interpretation. With Included's people data stories HR leaders "roll out of bed, dive in & delegate" saving money and increasing proactivity to delight employees.

positionList.title: Workforce Development Specialist
positionList.description:
SEIU Local 503's members provide valuable services to our communities, doing more than 500 different jobs in 85 state, local, government and non-profit agencies and care facilities. The services provided include helping deaf people get access to education, testing new drivers, collecting revenue, helping veterans, assisting at-risk youth, repairing bridges, maintaining Oregon’s parks and caring for children, seniors, and people with disabilities — just to name a few.

As workforce development specialist I was instrumental in training and cultivating key workforce populations in leadership, messaging and political strategy skills. Responsible for developing workforce committee capable of engaging in complex, long term negotiations at the state level. From these successful negotiations emerged significant wage and benefit improvements.

• Complex logistics project management
• Stakeholder Engagement    
• Messaging development and strategy
• Leadership development  
• Political Liasion to Elected Officials
• Administrative Law Liasion
• Directed staff in reaching geographically or ethnically isolated populations
• Contract Negotiations --training, preparation for semi-literate population 
• Track, evaluate and deliver metrics
• Recruited and retained the highest percentage of women of color members
• Highest percentage of active member leaders
• Identified, cultivated and fostered the leadership of the member who would go on to be elected as founding member-president in statewide election.

positionList.title: Advisory Council Member
positionList.description: Members of the research community provide insight to shape the content HBR develops and enrich our understanding of perspectives on ideas from HBR and the wider world of management and leadership. Members share in research findings, receive exclusive content from HBR and preview new content and products.
